CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE second_table (id INTEGER, test_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO second_table (id, test_id, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'desc1');
INSERT INTO second_table (id, test_id, description) VALUES (2, 1, 'desc2');
INSERT INTO second_table (id, test_id, description) VALUES (3, 2, 'desc3');
SELECT vdd_measure_rpc_time((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE 'test%'));
SELECT vdd_measure_rpc_time((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM second_table WHERE description LIKE 'desc%'));
SELECT vdd_measure_rpc_time((SELECT max(id) FROM test_table) FROM dual);
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT test_id FROM second_table WHERE description = 'desc1');
SELECT vdd_measure_rpc_time((SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT max(test_id) FROM second_table)));
